name: vox-annotate
title: Vox Annotate
description: The Vox-style annotate gesture: a keyword in a held sentence gets a hand-drawn marker while a thin connector draws up to a mono callout label, all as one choreographed beat on the cue.
evidence: Wave K K8: absorbs marker-highlight (four stroke styles, getTotalLength dash law) and adds the connector + callout as one gesture, per the X expert study demand slate

variables.label: Text
variables.default: Ship the story, not the spec

variables.label: Keyword
variables.description: First case-insensitive substring match in text receives the marker and annotation. Empty or unmatched draws nothing.

variables.label: Note
variables.description: Mono callout label at the end of the connector. Empty draws the marker only.

variables.label: Marker style
variables.description: Shape of the hand-drawn marker stroke.

variables.label: Draw at
variables.description: Second (from mount start) the annotate gesture starts. Clamped so the gesture completes before any exit.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Annotation ink color from the contract token map.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the lockup holds until the frame cuts.
